expectations.text: The controller sets Content-Type, Cache-Control, and X-Accel-Buffering headers
One action implements the with_stream pattern using response.headers['rack.hijack'] and proc
expectations.evidence: Uses AGUI::Protocol::Event with to_binary, not rack.hijack pattern

expectations.text: One action includes ActionController::Live and writes to response.stream
Both endpoints handle IOError for client disconnect
Both endpoints close the stream in ensure blocks
expectations.evidence: ensure blocks present at lines 65-68 and 93-97

expectations.text: The controller uses AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder to encode events before writing to the streams
The endpoints stream specific AG-UI events such as RunStartedEvent and RunFinishedEvent
expectations.evidence: Uses 'application/agent-ui' protocol events, not AG-UI SDK events
